summary: Small single-story rectangular modern building raised on a low plinth with a recessed central flat roof. Exterior walls use a lower cobblestone/stone variant band, a middle row of windows, a smooth light band above, then a wooden plank trim and a stone slab coping at roof edge. A raised white low border surrounds the building forming a narrow walkway or decorative plinth.

shape.overall_form: rectangular block with inset roof well and surrounding low perimeter border
shape.symmetry: bilaterally symmetric along long axis (mirrored windows and trim)

materials.name: wood
materials.role: horizontal trim / plank band below roof

elements: continuous horizontal row of windows along long sides (3-5 panes spaced evenly)
single-story interior with central recessed roof well (open to sky or shallow pit)
surrounding raised white border plinth one block thick
stone slab perimeter coping at roof edge
wood plank trim between upper smooth band and roof
rebuild_hints: Start with a rectangular footprint approx 7 blocks wide by 19 blocks long; build walls 3 blocks tall for the visible layered bands.

Place a lower cobblestone band (1-2 blocks high) around base, then a row of windows centered vertically, then a smooth light block band above the windows, then a single layer of wooden planks, topped with stone slabs as roof coping.
Inset the roof: build a one-block inward recess creating a shallow interior wooden plank floor visible from above, edged with stone slabs.
Add the external white border (quartz or similar) one block out from the wall at ground level forming a continuous low rim.
uncertainties: Exact block types for the white border and smooth light band: appears like quartz or smooth quartz but could be another white block (confidence ~0.7).
Lower wall material looks like cobblestone or coarse stone variants; could be stonebrick/mossy variants in other texture packs (confidence ~0.9 but not certain).
Internal layout and presence of a doorway not visible from provided angles; entrance side is unclear.
Precise footprint dimensions: estimated from pixel views; actual block count may differ by a few blocks.
